images.prompt: A raw, ultra-realistic 8k photograph of a stunningly beautiful, young Japanese female model with a top-tier gravure idol aesthetic, standing in a rooftop parking lot on a rainy day. She is wearing a trendy, form-fitting matching tracksuit in a sleek pastel color, the fabric slightly damp and clinging to her fit, curvy body to accentuate her slim waist and ample chest. She holds a clear umbrella, looking directly into the camera with intense, expressive eyes and a joyful, radiant smile that captivates the viewer. The background features the blurred city skyline and rain-slicked concrete, creating a soft bokeh effect. Direct hard sunlight breaks through the rain, illuminating her flawless skin texture with visible pores and faint vellus hair. Shot on Sony A7R IV, 85mm f/1.4 GM lens, depth of field, ray tracing, global illumination, film look grainy.8k photo, Large breasts
